SHORT NAME: VET_IND 

LONG NAME: VET_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This value is the most recent in the calendar year (or, if not populated, then most recent value from 
the two-prior year[s] is used).
